records.Subject: Directors & Officers Liability Claim
records.Description: D&O liability claim arising from alleged breach of fiduciary duty. Legal proceedings underway. Reserve set at £2.5m pending counsel opinion.

records.Subject: Warehouse Fire — Edinburgh
records.Description: Fire damage to Edinburgh warehouse unit. Loss adjusters appointed. Interim payment approved. Full reinstatement scope under assessment.

records.Subject: Third Party Bodily Injury
records.Description: Third party injury claim involving a visitor on client premises. Liability admitted. Reserve set at £125k covering anticipated settlement and legal costs.
